free_text: Effects of neutron number and nuclear deformation on
complete fusion of 60,64Ni+154Sm near the Coulomb
barrier
Advanced Science Research Center
Beam intensity is 10 to 35nA.
Target enrichment is 98.6%.
Chemical-form of target: Oxide
Physical-form of target is solid.
Target-thickness is 0.35mg/cm**2.
Backing is aluminium.
Jaeri tandem-booster facility
Solid angle of detector is 20.0msr.
Detector resolution is 70keV.(Typical energy
resolution of the individual front strips (FWHM))
Efficiency: The total efficiency of the present system
was typically 18% and 10% for xn and alpha+xn
channels, respectively.
JAERI recoil mass separator (RMS) [H.Ikezoe et
al., Nucl. Instrum. Methods Phys. Res.
The alpha peaks from the decay chain of
216Th-212Ra-208Rn and 5.486MeV alpha peak from
an 241Am source were used for the energy
calibration of PSSD.
DATA-MAX: Upper limit of measurements, which were
determined as a one-event counting yield
when no evaporation residue was observed
statistical error + systematic error for the
estimates of Recoil Mass Separator transmission
and Evaporation Residue distributions
for the estimates of Recoil Mass Separator
transmission and Evaporation Residue
distributions
Statistical model.(HIVAP [W.Reisdorf and
M.Schadel, Z.Phys.A343(1992)47].)
